title: T-111 — WIRING: Gate screen — wire GateChecklistPanel + AdvanceGateModal + GateApprovalModal + ApprovalHistoryTimeline into gate route
prompt:
# T-111 — Wire Gate screen components into the gate route

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6, §17.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Parent root: T-061
Depends on slices: T-107 (GateChecklistPanel), T-108 (AdvanceGateModal), T-109 (GateApprovalModal), T-110 (ApprovalHistoryTimeline)

## Goal
Integrate the four slice components into the gate route page. RSC page fetches project, gate items, and approval history; passes props into Client components; openModal handler dispatches between AdvanceGateModal and GateApprovalModal based on requiresApproval flag.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/projects/[id]/gate/[gateId]/page.tsx (RSC) fetches: getProject(id), getGateChecklist(id), getApprovalHistory(id).
2. Renders GateChecklistPanel + ApprovalHistoryTimeline; mounts AdvanceGateModal + GateApprovalModal as siblings; route-level state (or modal store) controls open/close + which modal.
3. openModal('advanceGate' | 'gateApproval', { project }) wired from GateChecklistPanel footer button.
4. After advanceProjectGate or approveProjectGate completes, router.refresh() updates the timeline.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/projects/[id]/gate/[gateId]/page.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the gate route renders for a valid project, when the page mounts, then GateChecklistPanel and ApprovalHistoryTimeline are rendered and AdvanceGateModal + GateApprovalModal are mounted (initially closed).
2. Given GateChecklistPanel's advance button is clicked on a non-requiresApproval gate, when openModal fires, then AdvanceGateModal opens; on a requiresApproval gate the GateApprovalModal opens instead.
3. Given an approval or advancement Server Action completes, when the page revalidates, then ApprovalHistoryTimeline reflects the new entry (router.refresh or revalidateTag).

## Test strategy
- Integration RTL test for the route page covering modal dispatch + post-action revalidation.
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test gate-page'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change any slice component file under this task (T-107..T-110 own those files).
- Do not call DB outside the RSC page.
